contexts.context: NW: I <mark>hate</mark> it, I agree we have to do it, but…
…I agree we have to do it, but I <mark>hate</mark> it.
NW: I <mark>hate</mark> to interrupt, but we’ve run out of time…
MK: No, because I <mark>hate</mark> call template.
…xsl:item to be optional, I really <mark>hate</mark> the idea of having an optional or required attribute…
…I expect some will love it and some will <mark>hate</mark> it.
MSM: For the record, I <mark>hate</mark> replacing a two syllable word with a three syllable…
